Gladius.title: Gladius
Gladius.description: A short sword primarily used for stabbing in close combat. The design is old, yet still effective.

Sword.title: Sword
Sword.description: A regular sword used for slashing in close combat. The weight and keen edge make it an excellent choice for severing limbs and slicing your enemies.

Knife.title: Knife
Knife.description: A small knife used for personal protection. Still capable of causing a reasonable amount of damage, even for its size.

Bat.title: Bat
Bat.description: A bat originally designed for sports, but makes an excellent weapon. Just the right size and weight for swinging which can cause heavy bruising and broken bones.

RoundShield.title: Round shield
RoundShield.description: A sturdy round shield used to block attacks, but can also be used to bash in to enemies.

Hatchet.title: Hatchet
Hatchet.description: A simple small and light one handed axe. Ideal for quickly hacking at enemies.

Spear.title: Spear
Spear.description: A long, well balanced two handed pole weapon. Used by thrusting the pointy end into your opponents.

BattleAxe.title: Battle Axe
BattleAxe.description: A large and heavy two handed axe, which requires a firm grip to wield. Slow to swing but capable of dealing heavy cutting damage.
